response: R.D. Reid acted in the original version of Dawn of the Dead directed by Zack Snyder, not the remake by George A. Romero. The original film, directed by Zack Snyder, was released in 2004, while the remake by George A. Romero was released in 1978. R.D. Reid appeared in Zack Snyder's "Dawn of the Dead" and George A. Romero's "Diary of the Dead."
